state.output:
<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
00002| import { alchemy, getAlchemyNetwork, getNetworkDetails } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00003| import { Network as AlchemyNetwork } from 'alchemy-sdk';
00004| import { isSpamToken } from '../../../lib/alchemy/spam';
00005| import { GetTokensByWalletResponse } from '../types';
00006| 
00007| /**
00008|  * Hook for fetching all token balances held by a wallet
00009|  *
00010|  * @example
00011|  * ```typescript
00012|  * const { data, isLoading, error, fetchTokensByWallet } = useGetTokensByWallet();
00013|  *
00014|  * useEffect(() => {
00015|  *   // Get all tokens across multiple chains with full metadata and prices
00016|  *   fetchTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains({
00017|  *     walletAddress: '0x123...abc',
00018|  *     chainIds: [1, 137, 10] // Ethereum, Polygon, Optimism
00019|  *   });
00020|  *
00021|  *   // Or with custom options
00022|  *   fetchTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains({
00023|  *     walletAddress: '0x123...abc',
00024|  *     chainIds: [1, 137],
00025|  *     withMetadata: true,
00026|  *     withPrices: false, // Skip pricing data for faster response
00027|  *     includeNativeTokens: true
00028|  *   });
00029|  * }, [fetchTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains]);
00030|  * ```
00031|  */
00032| export function useTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains() {
00033|   const [data, setData] = useState<GetTokensByWalletResponse | null>(null);
00034|   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
00035|   const [error, setError] = useState<Error | null>(null);
00036| 
00037|   /**
00038|    * Fetch all token balances for a specific wallet address across multiple chains
00039|    *
00040|    * @param params - Object containing all parameters:
00041|    *   - walletAddress: string - The wallet address to get token balances for (e.g., '0x123...abc')
00042|    *   - chainIds: number[] - Array of chain IDs to query (e.g., [1, 137, 10] for Ethereum, Polygon, Optimism)
00043|    *   - withMetadata?: boolean - Include token metadata (name, symbol, decimals, etc.) (default: true)
00044|    *   - withPrices?: boolean - Include token prices (default: true)
00045|    *   - includeNativeTokens?: boolean - Include native tokens like ETH, MATIC (default: true)
00046|    * @returns Promise<GetTokensByWalletResponse> - See type definition above for structure
00047|    */
00048|   const fetchTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains = useCallback(async (params: {
00049|     walletAddress: string;
00050|     chainIds: number[];
00051|     withMetadata?: boolean;
00052|     withPrices?: boolean;
00053|     includeNativeTokens?: boolean;
00054|   }): Promise<GetTokensByWalletResponse> => {
00055|     setIsLoading(true);
00056|     setError(null);
00057| 
00058|     try {
00059|       // Convert chainIds to networks and create portfolio addresses
00060|       const networks = params.chainIds.map(chainId => getAlchemyNetwork(chainId) as unknown as AlchemyNetwork);
00061|       const portfolioAddresses = [{
00062|         address: params.walletAddress,
00063|         networks: networks,
00064|       }];
00065| 
00066|       const response = await alchemy.portfolio.getTokensByWallet(
00067|         portfolioAddresses,
00068|         params.withMetadata ?? true,
00069|         params.withPrices ?? true,
00070|         params.includeNativeTokens ?? true
00071|       );
00072|       const formattedResponse = (response as any as GetTokensByWalletResponse);
00073|       formattedResponse.data.tokens = formattedResponse.data.tokens
00074|         .map((token) => {
00075|           return {
00076|             ...token,
00077|             tokenBalance: token.tokenBalance.startsWith("0x") ? BigInt(token.tokenBalance).toString() : token.tokenBalance,
00078|             tokenMetadata: {
00079|               name: token.tokenMetadata?.name ?? (!token.tokenAddress ? getNetworkDetails(token.network).name : null),
00080|               symbol: token.tokenMetadata?.symbol ?? (!token.tokenAddress ? getNetworkDetails(token.network).nativeGasTokenSymbol : null),
00081|               decimals: token.tokenMetadata?.decimals ?? null,
00082|               logo: token.tokenMetadata?.logo ?? null,
00083|             },
00084|           }
00085|         })
00086|         // Filter spam tokens by local list of spam tokens
00087|         .filter((token) => !isSpamToken(token.network, token.tokenAddress));
00088|       setData(formattedResponse);
00089|       return formattedResponse;
00090|     } catch (err) {
00091|       const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch tokens for wallet');
00092|       setError(error);
00093|       throw error;
00094|     } finally {
00095|       setIsLoading(false);
00096|     }
00097|   }, []);
00098| 
00099|   return {
00100|     data,
00101|     isLoading,
00102|     error,
00103|     fetchTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains,
00104|   };
00105| }
</file>
state.title: frontend/src/hooks/alchemy/portfolio/useTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains.ts
